Package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.predicate

Class PredicateLoader

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.predicate.PredicateLoader
public class PredicateLoader extends Object
This class is responsible for building an intermediate data structure that is used to construct the final clauses. The classes composing this intermediate data structure are located in package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.

In that intermediate data structure, all single predicates and all sub-formulas are factored and represented by the same descriptor (descriptors are located in package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.descriptor). Each individual instance of these predicates and sub-formulas are represented by a different instance of AbstractFormula or SignedFormula.

Instances should be created only by a context.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • PredicateLoader

      public PredicateLoader(AbstractContext context, Predicate predicate, Predicate originalPredicate, boolean isGoal)
      Creates a loader instance for the given predicate in the given context. Just creating this instance doesn't actually load the predicate and the context is not modified. The predicate will be loaded (and the context updated) only when the load() method is called.

      If isGoal is true, the predicate will be loaded as a goal (negated).

      Parameters:
      context - the context in which the loading will be performed
      predicate - the predicate to load
      originalPredicate - the original predicate (for origin tracking)
      isGoal - true iff the predicate should be loaded as a goal

    • PredicateLoader

      public PredicateLoader(AbstractContext context, Predicate predicate, boolean isGoal)
      Creates a loader instance for the given predicate in the given context. Just creating this instance doesn't actually load the predicate and the context is not modified. The predicate will be loaded (and the context updated) only when the load() method is called.

      If isGoal is true, the predicate will be loaded as a goal (negated).

      Parameters:
      context - the context in which the loading will be performed
      predicate - the predicate to load
      isGoal - true iff the predicate should be loaded as a goal

  • Method Details

    • load

      public void load()
      Actually loads the predicate in the context (these are arguments to the constructor). The context gets updated with all information gathered during the loading process.

    • getResult

      public INormalizedFormula getResult()
      Returns the formula computed during loading.

      Method load() must have been called prior to this method.

      Returns:
      the formula resulting from the loading

    • process

      private NormalizedFormula process(Predicate pred, boolean isPositive)
